title: ✅ Why This Works:
content:
✅ Why This Works:
• Allows students to choose their mode of reflection.
• Encourages a mix of humor and sincerity.
• Prepares them for deeper analysis without formal structure.

Final Alignment & Implementation Plan

✅ Macro-Level Adjustments Implemented
✅ Micro-Level Structure Updated
✅ All Protocols Integrated from Past Threads

🚀 Next Steps:
• Review and finalize the Canvas module structure to reflect these new components.
• Ensure weekly consistency between in-class work and assignments.
• Lock in final research & creative project protocols.

📌 Final Questions Before We Lock It In
1. How do we want to incorporate student voting for the films in Weeks 11-12?
2. Are there any additional rewards/incentives we want for the “Mastery Exam” challenge?
context: From document: Comprehensive Course Structure and Alternating Schedule (A & B Weeks… — chunk 41 (chunk 41/108)
